title: Non-record: 10L + Batched LoRA TTT (val_bpb=1.1160)
body:
## Summary

10-layer transformer with batched per-document LoRA test-time training.

- **Base val_bpb: 1.1476** (10 min train)
- **TTT val_bpb: 1.1160** (8.3 min eval)
- **Artifact: 15.75 MB**

### Base Model
- 10L, 512 dim, 8/4 GQA, 3x MLP with LeakyReLU(0.5)^2
- BigramHash 10240, SmearGate, value residual, gated attention
- Mixed int5/int6 quantization + zstd-22, 5% pruning

### LoRA TTT
- Rank-8 on Q/V/LM-head across all layers
- 64 documents batched in parallel
- Per-doc reset, Adam lr=0.01, 256-token chunks, 3 epochs
- Score on final epoch, documents split by BOS boundaries

Single seed. 3-seed validation coming.
